name: CardMiscInfo
description: Extended per-card metadata returned only when `misc=yes` is passed to `/cardinfo.php`.

beta_name.description: Original beta name (if different from the released name).

viewsweek.description: YGOPRODeck card page view count over the last 7 days.

formats.description: Tournament formats the card is legal in.

treated_as.description: An alternate card name this card is officially treated as (for ruling purposes).

has_effect.description: 1 if the card has an actual rules effect; 0 if not.

genesys_points.description: GenesYS-format point cost. Only returned when `format=genesys` is passed.

question_atk.description: 1 if the card has `?` as ATK (special-case Pendulum/Effect ATK).

question_def.description: 1 if the card has `?` as DEF.

staple.description: `yes` if YGOPRODeck classifies this card as a staple in any format.
